ReviveX Leather Boot Care Waterproof Gel Kit Outdoor Shoe Care Cleaner Set

This all-in-one boot care kit contains everything you need to waterproof new boots and restore older boots to like-new condition.

Key Features

  • Clean leather boots and shoes properly with a concentrated gel cleaner that remove dirt and grime without harming the fabric
  • Protect and condition footwear from water and stains to keep them looking good with the kit’s specialized leather water repellent
  • Maximize breathability by enhancing performance of leather footwear to keep feet feeling cool and dry, Concentrated – A few drops will clean a whole shoe
  • Restore old shoes with a kit that includes Revivex Boot and Show Cleaner, Leather Water Repellent, brush and cleaning cloth
  • Packaging may vary

Product Specifications

  • UPC: 614823183217

ReviveX Leather Boot Care Kit is part of a comprehensive line of Care and Repair products from Gear Aid.

Specifically designed for all full-grain leather footwear. Provides deep penetrating weatherproofing to keep your feet dry. Gives leather footwear a rich traditional outdoor look.

With Gear Aid, anyone can be a master of gear repair.
